description: Stylish and spacious, the F50 backpack from adidas is designed for Basketball players, gymmers, college-goers and those heading out for a weekend vacation. What makes this bag unique is that its straps are engineered with LoadSpring technology that keeps your shoulders and back safe even when carrying a heavy load. It also has a protective rain cover to keep it safe during the monsoons.Capacity: 6kgMade of 100% polyester with a 100% polyester shell for durability and easy cleaning Outer has a protective rain cover making the bag waterproofBranded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bagOne main copiously spaced zippered compartment with a separator, and has two zips One front zippered compartmentOne mesh organizer to hold a sipper and one pouch on the opposite side with umbrella holder loopsTwill tape haul loop for handling ease Wide, adjustable padded handles with LoadSpring technology for carrying ease and to protect the shoulders and back from injuriesErgonomically padded back for carrying comfort Branding and F50 printed on the front pouch for styleCare only hand washClean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wringLine dry Do not iron
